# Pulse Protocol

> Sealed Agent Commitments â€” extending the audit perimeter to the agent's
> reasoning. Agents commit their decisions before they execute them; sealed
> reasoning, ERC-8004 reputation, and Uniswap v4 hook gating make drift
> slashable and (at the v4 layer) physically impossible.

Pulse is a hackathon project for ETHGlobal Open Agents 2026. It ships:

- Three Solidity contracts (`Pulse.sol`, `PulseGatedHook.sol`,
  `PulseAgentINFT.sol`) deployed on Eth Sepolia + 0G Galileo testnet.
- A composable TypeScript SDK (`@pulse/sdk`) with primitives for commit,
  reveal, hook-gated swap, ENS identity, sealed inference (0G Compute),
  and ERC-7857 iNFT minting.
- An agent-agnostic skill bundle (`pulse-skills`) installable via
  `npx skills add ss251/ethglobal-openagents` â€” 9 skills, 6 framework
  integration recipes (Anthropic SDK, Hermes, LangChain, ElizaOS,
  OpenClaw, Python).
- 27 forge tests, all passing.

The on-chain identity stack: `pulseagent.eth` on Sepolia ENS resolves to
ERC-8004 token id #3906 and is minted as ERC-7857 iNFT tokenId #1 on 0G
Galileo. Every Pulse commitment the agent makes appends to the iNFT's
on-chain history; transfer the iNFT and the new owner inherits the rep
trail.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): project overview, deployed addresses, prize-track context.
- [INTEGRATING.md](INTEGRATING.md): 30-minute fresh-integrator path from clone to first revealed commitment.
- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): protocol specification â€” commitment lifecycle, hash schemes, signer-provider role.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): release history (Keep a Changelog format).
- [FEEDBACK.md](FEEDBACK.md): builder feedback on the Uniswap Trading API (required for the Uniswap prize track).
- [docs/adr/0001-audit-perimeter.md](docs/adr/0001-audit-perimeter.md): architecture-decision record explaining the threat model and three load-bearing trade-offs (atomic-rollback gap, Anthropic body-size gating, reveal-tx gas budgeting).

## Smart contracts

- [contracts/Pulse.sol](contracts/Pulse.sol): commit-reveal primitive. `commit`, `reveal`, `markExpired`. ERC-8004 `giveFeedback` on every transition.
- [contracts/hooks/PulseGatedHook.sol](contracts/hooks/PulseGatedHook.sol): Uniswap v4 hook with only `BEFORE_SWAP_FLAG`. Swaps must include `hookData = abi.encode(commitmentId, nonce)`; mismatched intent reverts before any state change.
- [contracts/inft/PulseAgentINFT.sol](contracts/inft/PulseAgentINFT.sol): ERC-7857 (intelligent NFT) implementation. `mint`, `transfer`, `clone`, `bindPulseAgent`, `recordCommitment`. Self-verifier pattern with ECDSA proofs.

## Deploy scripts

- [script/Deploy.s.sol](script/Deploy.s.sol): deploy `Pulse.sol`.
- [script/DeployHook.s.sol](script/DeployHook.s.sol): CREATE2-mine + deploy `PulseGatedHook` with the `BEFORE_SWAP_FLAG` bits in its address.
- [script/DeployINFT.s.sol](script/DeployINFT.s.sol): deploy `PulseAgentINFT` on 0G Galileo.

## TypeScript SDK â€” `@pulse/sdk`

- [packages/sdk/src/pulse.ts](packages/sdk/src/pulse.ts): `commitIntent`, `revealIntent`, `markExpiredIntent`, `PULSE_ABI`.
- [packages/sdk/src/hook.ts](packages/sdk/src/hook.ts): `intentHashForSwap`, `encodeHookData`, `encodeSwapAction`.
- [packages/sdk/src/zg.ts](packages/sdk/src/zg.ts): `sealedReason`, `fetchSealedReasoning` (0G Compute).
- [packages/sdk/src/ens.ts](packages/sdk/src/ens.ts): `setAgentENSRecords`, `pulseProvenanceFromENS`, `resolveAgentByENS`.
- [packages/sdk/src/trading.ts](packages/sdk/src/trading.ts): `quoteSwap`, `executeFromQuote`, `pulseHookData` (Uniswap Trading API).
- [packages/sdk/src/inft.ts](packages/sdk/src/inft.ts): full ERC-7857 primitive surface â€” `encryptStateBlob`, `buildMintProof`, `mintINFT`, `bindPulseAgent`, `recordCommitment`, `readINFTState`.

## Agent-facing CLI scripts

- [scripts/autonomous-trade.ts](scripts/autonomous-trade.ts): keystone â€” reason â†’ commit â†’ wait â†’ atomic-reveal swap.
- [scripts/force-drift.ts](scripts/force-drift.ts): demo â€” drifted swap reverted by hook, watcher locks Violated.
- [scripts/pulse-status.ts](scripts/pulse-status.ts): one-shot status read with window flags.
- [scripts/pulse-introspect.ts](scripts/pulse-introspect.ts): recent agent txs OR `--commitment-id N` deep dive.
- [scripts/pulse-retry.ts](scripts/pulse-retry.ts): recover Pending commitment after a swap revert (same nonce, no drift).
- [scripts/inft-bind.ts](scripts/inft-bind.ts): mint pulseagent.eth as an ERC-7857 iNFT on 0G + bind + record commitments.
- [scripts/watch-and-slash.ts](scripts/watch-and-slash.ts): off-chain watcher daemon that closes the atomic-reveal rollback gap.

## Skills bundle â€” `pulse-skills`

- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/README.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/README.md): bundle overview + install.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-autonomous-trade/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-autonomous-trade/SKILL.md): keystone skill.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-commit/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-commit/SKILL.md): commit primitive.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-reveal/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-reveal/SKILL.md): reveal primitive.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-status-check/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-status-check/SKILL.md): status read.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-gated-swap/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-gated-swap/SKILL.md): Uniswap v4 swap through Pulse.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-recover/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-recover/SKILL.md): recover Pending commitment.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-introspect/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-introspect/SKILL.md): inspect activity.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-inft/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/pulse-inft/SKILL.md): ERC-7857 iNFT mint.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/sealed-inference-with-pulse/SKILL.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/skills/sealed-inference-with-pulse/SKILL.md): TEE-attested sealed reasoning (0G Compute).

## Framework integration recipes

- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/anthropic-sdk.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/anthropic-sdk.md): Anthropic API + Claude Agent SDK.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/hermes.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/hermes.md): Hermes (Nous Research).
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/langchain.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/langchain.md): LangChain / LangGraph.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/elizaos.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/elizaos.md): ElizaOS / Eliza.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/openclaw.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/openclaw.md): OpenClaw.
- [packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/python.md](packages/plugins/pulse-skills/integrations/python.md): Python (web3.py).

## Optional

- [hermes-sandbox/SOUL.md](hermes-sandbox/SOUL.md): persona for the Pulse agent running inside a Hermes container with a Telegram gateway.
- [hermes-sandbox/AUTH_NOTES.md](hermes-sandbox/AUTH_NOTES.md): three non-obvious blockers we hit wiring Claude Pro/Max OAuth into the Hermes container â€” Keychain stale entries, Anthropic body-size gating, skills toolset.
- [deployments/sepolia.json](deployments/sepolia.json): full deployment record for Eth Sepolia.

## Deployed addresses

- Eth Sepolia (chainId 11155111):
  - `Pulse`: `0xbe1b0051f5672F3CAAc38849B8Aaeeb51Dc6BF34`
  - `PulseGatedHook`: `0x274b3c0f55c2db8c392418649c1eb3aad1ecc080`
  - `pUSD` (mock): `0xB1e9c59B50D3b79cA09f4f9fd6ca5cC027EAeDDA`
  - `pWETH` (mock): `0xC8d229E60C4a02fA49D060B1f0b08D956E6ef349`
  - ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry (canonical): `0x8004A818BFB912233c491871b3d84c89A494BD9e`
  - ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry (canonical): `0x8004B663056A597Dffe9eCcC1965A193B7388713`
- 0G Galileo (chainId 16602):
  - `PulseAgentINFT`: `0x180D8105dc415553e338BDB06251e8aC3e48227C` (tokenId 1 holds pulseagent.eth's encrypted state)
- ENS (Sepolia): `pulseagent.eth` â€” five text records bind agentId, signerProvider, pulseHistory, description, avatar, plus `0g.inft = 0g-galileo:16602:0x180D8105â€¦:1` for the iNFT pointer.
